stemHtml: When must a pilot announce wake turbulence category to ATS?

options.a: If MTOM exceeds 110,000 kg, on each initial call on a new frequency.
options.b: If MTOM exceeds 136,000 kg, on each initial call on a new frequency.
options.c: If MTOM exceeds 136,000 kg, on every call.
options.d: If MTOM exceeds 110,000 kg, on every call.
